title: Tax Conventions Implementation Act, 2002
description: Tax Conventions Implementation Act, 2002 (Tax Conventions Implementation Act, 2002). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Tax Conventions Implementation Act, 2002 .

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 2 (1) The Canada — Kuwait Tax Agreement Act, 2002 is enacted as follows: [See Canada — Kuwait Tax Agreement Act, 2002 ] (2) The schedule to the Canada — Kuwait Tax Agreement Act, 2002 is set out in Schedule 1 to this Act.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 3 (1) The Canada — Mongolia Tax Convention Act, 2002 is enacted as follows: [See Canada — Mongolia Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] (2) The schedule to the Canada — Mongolia Tax Convention Act, 2002 is set out in Schedule 2 to this Act.

provisions.chapter: PART 3 Canada — United Arab Emirates Tax Convention
provisions.content: 4 (1) The Canada — United Arab Emirates Tax Convention Act, 2002 is enacted as follows: [See Canada — United Arab Emirates Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] (2) Schedules 1 and 2 to the Canada — United Arab Emirates Tax Convention Act, 2002 are set out in Schedule 3 to this Act.

5 (1) The Canada — Moldova Tax Convention Act, 2002 is enacted as follows: [See Canada — Moldova Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] (2) Schedules 1 and 2 to the Canada — Moldova Tax Convention Act, 2002 are set out in Schedule 4 to this Act.

6 (1) The Canada — Norway Tax Convention Act, 2002 is enacted as follows: [See Canada — Norway Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] (2) The schedule to the Canada — Norway Tax Convention Act, 2002 is set out in Schedule 5 to this Act.

provisions.chapter: Canada — Norway Income Tax Convention Act, 1967

provisions.title: SCHEDULE 1
provisions.content: SCHEDULE 1 (Section 2) [See Canada — Kuwait Tax Agreement Act, 2002 ] SCHEDULE 2 (Section 3) [See Canada — Mongolia Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] SCHEDULE 3 (Section 4) [See Canada — United Arab Emirates Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] SCHEDULE 4 (Section 5) [See Canada — Moldova Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] SCHEDULE 5 (Section 6) [See Canada — Norway Tax Convention Act, 2002 ] SCHEDULES 6 AND 7 [Amendments]
